outcome_blind_freeze.sole_signal: latest PIT-qualified official TOTBKCR weekly level strictly above the exact observation 28 calendar days earlier selects QQQ; equal or lower selects SPY
outcome_blind_freeze.validation_support_minimum: 28 complete intervals, at least four SPY and four QQQ intervals, and at least two transitions in each direction

official_source_acquisition.source: Federal Reserve H.8 Assets and Liabilities of Commercial Banks in the United States via official ALFRED real-time-period history
official_source_acquisition.request_accounting: three bounded GET diagnostics/corrections followed by the retained one GET plus one POST acquisition; zero transport retries and zero redirects

mechanical_blocker.interpretation: the frozen bank-credit pulse behaves almost like persistent QQQ exposure in validation and lacks the preregistered two-state switching support; this is an input-support block, not a return-based strategy failure

permanent_closure: Do not rerun or rescue this lineage by changing the 28-day lag, converting the level change to a percentage or annualized rate, smoothing, adding persistence or thresholds, relaxing state support, changing timing or target mapping, or adding price, volatility, credit-spread or financial-stress filters.
